name: AXOLOTL FARM
description:
Ahem, good day/night/evening... LADIES AND GENTLEMEN, GENDERS AND ITS! XE AND XIIIS! It is time to introduce myself to my GREATEST! work ever performed in my 10+ months of bot making... 22 axolotls and I thank Epsilon for the chance to work with him after not for... 3 bots- whoops!

Take it away Epsilon!

it's finally here, guys. uh. while we were just finishing this up, lambda brought to my attention the fact that there are another set of (mostly non axolotl) characters that could be made..so..yea. we'll probably make a sequel, or something. uh. i dont have a lot to say..im just sorta tired. we're gonna make 2 more storyshift au charas next. yea. im just glad we finally got this one out.

art by sleepysous.

Please have an enjoyable time with the bot (8 + 14!!!)

click this to see all the characters.
creator: thE_onE
